name: Red Pepper Coulis (Version 2)
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the peppers until they are tender.
2. Puree the peppers.
3. Combine the shallots, wine, and vermouth; simmer until the shallots are translucent.
4. Add the red pepper puree to the shallot mixture.
5. Reduce the mixture by half.
6. Add the cream and reduce to nappe' (a sauce that will evenly coat the back of a spoon and be thickened).
7. Whisk in the butter until incorporated.
8. Adjust the seasoning to taste with salt and pepper.
